transcript: Speaker A: ये लो, इस महीने के सामान का खर्च। [Here, take this month's household expenses.] Speaker B: It's okay, आप रख लो, मेरे पास है। [It's okay, you keep it, I have money.] Speaker A: अरे, तुम्हारे पास पैसे कहाँ से आए? [Hey, where did you get money from?] Speaker B: मैं आजकल मोहल्ले के बच्चों का इंग्लिश ट्यूशन ले रही हूँ, और ये मेरी पहली कमाई है। [These days I am taking English tuition for the neighborhood kids, and this is my first earning.] Speaker A: तुम्हें खुद टूटी-फूटी इंग्लिश आती है, तुम कैसे सिखा पाओगी? [You yourself know broken English, how will you teach?] Speaker B: For your information, I can speak English fluently and confidently. I don't need any help in understanding anything. I used to be a topper in my school and I can contribute better to my family with a job. Speaker A: अरे, इतनी अच्छी इंग्लिश कैसे सीखी? [Hey, how did you learn such good English?] Speaker B: मैंने SpeakX ऐप डाउनलोड किया है। इसके AI इंग्लिश टीचर के साथ जब तुम ऑफिस जाते थे, प्रैक्टिस करती थी। और 2 हफ़्तों में मेरी इंग्लिश फर्स्ट क्लास हो गई है। और अब मैं कभी भी इंग्लिश में बात कर सकती हूँ। [I have downloaded the SpeakX app. I used to practice with its AI English teacher when you went to the office. And in 2 weeks, my English became first class. And now I can speak in English anytime.] Speaker A: AI? कितने पैसे खर्च हुए इसमें? [AI? How much money was spent on this?] Speaker B: एक कप चाय से भी कम। [Less than a cup of tea.] Speaker A: क्या बात कर रही है! फिर तो मैं आज ही इसे ट्राई करूँगा। मुझे भी ऑफिस में इंग्लिश काम आएगा। कब तक एक ही सैलरी पर रहूँगा। [What are you saying! Then I will try it today itself. English will be useful for me in the office too. How long will I stay on the same salary.] Speaker B: क्या आप भी मेरी तरह सबको चौंकाना चाहते हैं? तो आज ही SpeakX इंस्टॉल करो और 2 हफ्ते में फर्राटेदार इंग्लिश बोलो। [Do you also want to surprise everyone like me? Then install SpeakX today and speak fluent English in 2 weeks.]
on_screen_text: Yeh lo [Take this] / samaan ka karcha [household expenses] / It's okay / Mere paas hai [I have it] / Aare [Hey] / paise kaha se [where did the money come from] / Main aaj kal mohalle [These days I am in the neighborhood] / ka English tuition [taking English tuition] / le rahi hu [taking] / aur ye meri [and this is my] / pehli kamayi hai [first earning] / tumhe khud [you yourself] / tooti footi [broken] / English aati hai [know English] / tumhe kaise [how will you] / sikha paoge [teach] / For your information / I can speak English / fluently and / confidently / I don't need any / help in / understanding / anything / I used to be a / topper / in my school and / I can contribute / better to my / family / with a job / Are itni acchi [Hey, such good] / English kaise [English how] / seekhi [learned] / Maine speak x [I downloaded SpeakX] / app download / kiya hai [have done] / Iske AI English [Its AI English] / teacher ke saath [with teacher] / jab tum office [when you went to office] / jaate the practice [practiced] / karti thi [used to do] / aur 2 [and 2] / hafton me meri [weeks my] / English first / class ho gayi hai [has become first class] / aur ab mai [and now I] / kabhi bhi English me [anytime in English] / baat kar sakti hu [can talk] / AI? / kitne paise [how much money] / kharch hue ispe [spent on this] / 1 cup / chai se bhi [even than tea] / kam [less] / Kya baat kar rahi [What are you saying] / hai / phir to mai [then I] / aaj hi ise [today itself this] / try karunga [will try] / Mujhe bhi [I also] / office me English [English in office] / kaam aayega [will be useful] / Kab tak ek hi [How long same] / salary par [salary] / rahunga [will stay] / Kya aap bhi meri [Do you also like me] / tarah sabko [everyone] / chaukana [surprise] / chahte hain [want to] / Toh aaj hi speak x [So today itself SpeakX] / install karo [install] / aur 2 hafte me [and in 2 weeks] / farratedar English [fluent English] / bolo [speak]
summary: A wife surprises her husband by refusing household money, showing her own earnings from teaching English. She credits her fluency to practicing with the SpeakX AI tutor for less than the cost of a cup of tea, prompting her husband and viewers to download the app.
